ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "x_value" INTEGER /* X value used in the prediction */,
  "y_value" INTEGER /* Y value used in the prediction */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (train or test) */,
  "raw_prediction" REAL /* Raw prediction value */,
  "cumulative_prediction" REAL /* Cumulative prediction value */,
  "cloglog_prediction" REAL /* Cloglog prediction value */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version that made the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was last updated */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* Evaluation metric used to evaluate the prediction */,
  "evaluation_score" REAL /* Evaluation score of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, random forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was last updated */,
  "library_used" TEXT /* Library used to implement the model */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (train or test) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which the metric is recorded */,
  "model_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used in the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entity */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, update) */,
  "accessed_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed entity */,
  "accessed_entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the accessed entity (e.g., dataset, model) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accessed_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("accessed_entity_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions_datasets" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset_versions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id", "version_id")
)
